message:
feat: replace glibc call-through wrappers with native Rust implementations

Core changes:
- pthread_abi: Replace ~20 dlsym-based glibc wrappers with native impls
  using AtomicI32 spinlocks, futex barriers, and prctl thread naming
- dirent_abi: Replace libc seekdir/telldir/rewinddir/scandir/readdir_r
  with native DIR_REGISTRY-based impls using kernel d_off tracking
- signal_abi: Replace libc sigwait/sigpending with raw rt_sig* syscalls
- runtime_policy: Remove passthrough bypass for Allocator/StringMemory/
  Stdio/Threading families — all API families now go through real
  observe/decide pipeline with cross-family cohomology monitoring
- ptr_validator: Replace no-op fingerprint/canary checks with real
  verification including generation/size/hash validation and TOCTOU
  protection via validation_epoch snapshots
- arena: Add cross-shard interior pointer search and fix canary address
  calculation

Test/data cleanup:
- Prune completed bead chains from conformance coverage JSON
- Update feature parity ledger (support_total_exported: 250 -> 929)
- Remove completed IN_PROGRESS gap entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
